title: Mace but its Toy Hammer
description: This resource pack will turn vanilla mace into the toy plush hammer with fun hit sound!
body:
A funny resource pack that turns **Minecraft Vanilla mace** into the **Toy Hammer**.

There is RP versions for Minecraft 1.21.7-1.21.11, but basically you can download it for any Minecraft version that have Mace (1.21-1.21.11).
